channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This New York bar hosted an AI dating pop-up where singles matched with chatbots for Valentine’s Day
item.description: A quarter of those under 30 say they’ve used AI for companionship, according to Associated Press-NORC polling . The one thing missing? Somewhere to ta...

item.title: Dutch Bros is growing fast. Here’s why its expansion plans matter more than its stock bump
item.description: Starbucks competitor Dutch Bros saw its stock price rise in premarket trading on Friday after the coffee chain posted double-digit revenue growth in i...

item.title: New York Fed economists confirm that Americans are the ones footing the bill for 90% of Trump’s tariffs
item.description: The president has insisted other countries are paying for his import taxes. American companies and consumers are telling a different story.

item.title: Analog-obsessed Gen Zers are buying $40 app blockers to limit their social media use and take a break from the ‘slot machine in your pocket’
item.description: App-blocking devices like Bloom and Brick promise to improve focus and decrease compulsive phone checks by making social media harder to access.

item.title: Ben Affleck has one word for AI-generated creative writing. His take on LLMs is going viral
item.description: Could a film industry entirely crafted from AI ever exist? Social media is abuzz with movie scenes made with Seedance 2.0, the latest tech in AI video...

item.title: Measles 2026 update: These states are seeing new outbreaks as infections hit all-time highs
item.description: It’s only February, and an outbreak of measles infections is already inching toward nearly 1,000 cases this year in the U.S. Infections are at an all-...

item.title: How to Avoid Making the Same Fatal Mistake That Led to Sears’ Demise
item.description: When faced with disruption, Sears made a common but fatal error. Many leaders today are repeating the past.

item.title: This Startup’s Creation Is Hotter than the Sun—and It Just Set a Nuclear Fusion Record
item.description: Helion Energy achieved temperatures of about 270 million degrees Fahrenheit as it works towards developing fusion power.

item.title: Exclusive: Binance fires top investigators who claim to have uncovered evidence of Iranian sanctions violations
item.description: Internal findings by the fired investigators reviewed by Fortune pointed to over $1 billion in Tether flowing through Binance to Iran-linked wallets.

item.title: OpenAI Accuses China’s DeepSeek of Stealing Its Tech to Build Cut‑Rate Rival AI Models
item.description: Rumors are swirling that the Chinese AI company will launch its new model next week.

item.title: Top analyst warns the economy is figuring out how to grow without creating new jobs, leaving a major vulnerability
item.description: The economy will grow because of higher productivity, aided in part by AI, says Michael Pearce of Oxford Economics. But people aren't core to that sto...

item.title: Wendy’s is closing hundreds of U.S. restaurants as domestic sales slide
item.description: Wendy’s is moving ahead with its plans to close hundreds of restaurants, amounting to between 5 and 6% of its total stores in the U.S., according to i...

item.title: Gen Z Men Are Flocking to This 87‑Year‑Old Self‑Help Book for Success Hacks
item.description: Fans of Strava and crypto continue to love Napoleon Hill’s Think and Grow Rich. Book influencer Ben Mercer consider why it remains so popular among st...

item.title: Exclusive: The Walton family-funded PE firm that owns Rapha Cycling Club presses pause on all new investments
item.description: RZC Investments, the private equity firm of Walmart heirs Tom and Steuart Walton, said it was still “actively” managing its current portfolio.

item.title: Elon Musk’s X Accused of Selling Blue Checkmarks to Sanctioned Iranian Government Accounts
item.description: Report finds that more than 24 X accounts used by Iranian officials and news outlets have blue checkmarks.
